prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约6757名→10347名→4801名→6134名→3671名，波动较大。2025年位次3671为近5年最优（数字最小），属典型"大年"；2023年位次4801 、2024年位次6134为近年中位水平。2025年较2024年前移约2463名，幅度显著，2026年存在回调压力；该校在陕西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年51人、2022 年41人、2023年41人、2024年32人、2025年17人，呈持续缩减趋势；2026年计划增至37人，较2025年扩招约117.6%，大幅增加招生名额，对竞争压力有明显缓解作用。 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28名，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，属国内顶尖工科院校，办学层次和综合实力对考生有持 续吸引力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档信号；抖音热度排名第55位，评价"较热"，短视频平台曝光量中等偏上；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（ "降至420分"等不实传言），但2025年实际位次大幅前移，表明负面舆情影响有限。整体声誉中性偏稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，力学、土 木工程、机械工程、工商管理、管理科学与工程、软件工程等获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，共10个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。招生专业覆盖化工与制药 类、机械类、电子信息类、人工智能、计算机科学与技术等，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自 动化持续高热推荐，人工智能谨慎观望，化工与制药类（关联生化环材）明显劝退。陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整 体竞争；大连理工大学位于辽宁省大连市，非陕西省本地高校，无本省招生倾斜。该校在陕西招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属外 省招生正常比例。东北地区高校对陕西考生地域吸引力一般，无明显地域偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年"大年"位次3671的回调压力、2026年大幅扩招117.6%的缓解作用 、陕西省物理类考生增加19.7%的竞争加剧，以及学校声誉和学科优势的稳定吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移。，结合考生规模扩 大和"大年回调"做有限修正，预测最低位次约6062名，区间5562–6562名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）
- 电子信息类（创新班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子科学与技术
- 智能建造
- 船舶与海洋工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（电子信息材料、金属材料工程等）
- 化工与制药类
- 过程装备与控制工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5562–6562名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（电子科学与技术、智能建造），一档专业（人工智能大师班、计算机拔尖班）作为冲刺，三档专业（材料类、化工 与制药类）作为稳妥保底。大连理工大学工科实力突出，化学工程与技术A+为全国顶尖，虽社会热度偏低但学科实力强劲，适合对化工有兴趣的考生重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 6757 → 10347 → 4801 → 6134 → 3671, showing significant fluctuations. The 2025 ranking of 3671 is the best in the past five years (smallest number), representing a typical "big year"; the 2023 ranking of 4801 and 2024 ranking of 6134 are mid-level in recent years. Compared to 2024, the 2025 ranking moved forward by about 2463 places, a notable shift, indicating a correction pressure in 2026. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Shaanxi Province: 51 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 17 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend; the 2026 plan increases to 37, an expansion of about 117.6% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, which helps alleviate competition pressure. It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 28th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to top domestic engineering institutions, with sustained attractiveness to candidates due to its educational level and comprehensive strength.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission cutoff anomalies; Douyin popularity ranking is 55th, rated as "relatively hot", with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms; in 2024, there were abnormal signals of admission cutoff (unverified rumors like "dropped to 420 points"), but the actual ranking in 2025 moved forward significantly, indicating limited impact of negative public opinion. Overall reputation is neutral to stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, etc., were rated A, Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering were rated A-, totaling 10 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering capabilities. Enrollment majors cover Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, etc., highly matching its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering (related to biochemistry, environmental, materials) is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Dalian University of Technology is located in Dalian, Liaoning Province, not a local university in Shaanxi, with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), which is normal for an out-of-province university. The regional appeal of universities in Northeast China to Shaanxi candidates is average, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction pressure from the 2025 "big year" ranking of 3671, the mitigating effect of a significant 117.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 19.7% increase in physics category candidates in Shaanxi Province, and the stable appeal of the university's reputation and disciplinary advantages, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift backward significantly compared to 2025. With limited adjustments based on the expanded candidate pool and "big year correction", the predicted minimum ranking is about 6062, with a range of 5562–6562.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Disciplines Top Talent Program)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Science and Technology
- Intelligent Construction
- Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Electronic Information Materials, Metal Materials Engineering, etc.)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5562–6562, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Construction) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Artificial Intelligence Master Class, Computer Top Talent Program) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering) as a safe backup. Dalian University of Technology has outstanding engineering strength, with Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A+ as the top in the country. Although its social popularity is relatively low, its disciplinary strength is robust, making it suitable for candidates interested in chemical engineering to consider seriously.
